title: St. Mary Armenian Church
tagline: St. Mary Armenian Church — spiritual town of West Bengal

overview.short: Saint Mary Church of Saidabad, (Armenian: Սուրբ Աստվածածին Եկեղեցի) is a parish of the Armenian Apostolic Church situated at Saidabad, Cossimbazar near Baharampur in Murshidabad di
overview.description: Saint Mary Church of Saidabad, (Armenian: Սուրբ Աստվածածին Եկեղեցի) is a parish of the Armenian Apostolic Church situated at Saidabad, Cossimbazar near Baharampur in Murshidabad district in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is dedicated to Mary, mother of Jesus.

topPlaces.name: Dutch Cemetery, Murshidabad
topPlaces.description: Dutch Cemetery is a heritage Christian cemetery situated at Kalikapur, Cossimbazar in the Berhampore CD block in the Berhampore subdivision of Murshidabad district, in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Goaljan
topPlaces.description: Goaljan is a census town in the Berhampore CD block of the Berhampore subdivision in the Murshidabad district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Cossimbazar
topPlaces.description: Cossimbazar is a sub-urban area of Berhampore city in the Berhampore CD block in the Berhampore subdivision of Murshidabad district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Berhampore
topPlaces.description: Berhampore (), also known as Baharampur ([ˈbɔɦoˌrɔmpur]), is a city and a municipality in the state of West Bengal, India. Berhampore is the administrative headquarters of the Murshidabad district.

topPlaces.name: Berhampore (community development block)
topPlaces.description: Berhampore is a community development block that forms an administrative division in the Berhampore subdivision of Murshidabad district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Gopjan
topPlaces.description: Gopjan is a census town in the Berhampore CD block. It is located in the Berhampore subdivision of the Murshidabad district, in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Residency Cemetery, Babulbona
topPlaces.description: Residency Cemetery, Babulbona also known as Station Burial ground or Babulbona Cemetery is a heritage Christian cemetery situated at Babulbona, Baharampur, Murshidabad district in the Indian state of West Bengal. According to the Archaeological Survey of India, as mentioned in the List of Monuments of National Importance in West Bengal, the Residency Cemetery also known as 'Station Burial Ground' is an ASI Listed Monument.

topPlaces.name: Panchanantala (Berhampore)
topPlaces.description: Panchanantala is a locality cum business area in Berhampore city. It is an important junction connecting National Highway 34 to State Highway 11.

Residency Cemetery, Babulbona also known as Station Burial ground or Babulbona Cemetery is a heritage Christian cemetery situated at Babulbona, Baharampur, Murshidabad district in the Indian state of West Bengal. According to the Archaeological Survey of India, as mentioned in the List of Monuments of National Importance in West Bengal, the Residency Cemetery also known as 'Station Burial Ground' is an ASI Listed Monument.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Mary Armenian Church?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Mary Armenian Church is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Mary Armenian Church?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (164 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (171 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Mary Armenian Church?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Mary Armenian Church at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Mary Armenian Church?
faq.a: Stays in St. Mary Armenian Church start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Mary Armenian Church?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dutch Cemetery, Murshidabad, Goaljan, Cossimbazar, Berhampore, Berhampore (community development block).
